A GIS-based investigation discovers large-scale loss of wetlands in Florida, underscoring the failure of federal commitments to protect these critical areas.

Chris Davis and Matthew Doig September - October 2004
Government & Politics

An analysis of Florida's voter purge list revealed a significant flaw that kept Hispanics off the felon purge list, raising concerns over voter suppression.
